metadata.title: 해피홀스 | AI 비디오 생성기
metadata.description: 해피홀스에서 텍스트, 이미지, 클립으로 AI 비디오를 생성하세요. 텍스트-비디오, 이미지-비디오, 비디오-비디오 변환을 지원합니다.

page.title: 해피홀스 AI 비디오 생성기
page.description: 해피홀스에서 텍스트, 이미지, 클립으로 AI 비디오를 생성하세요. 텍스트-비디오, 이미지-비디오, 비디오-비디오 변환을 지원합니다.

generator.title: 비디오 생성기
generator.description: 해피홀스와 관련 AI 모델로 비디오를 생성하세요. 텍스트-비디오, 이미지-비디오, 비디오-비디오 변환을 지원합니다.

models.seedance-2_desc: 더 안정적인 결과를 위한 추천 모드

status.pending: Waiting for the model to start

errors.timeout: Video generation timed out. Please try again.
errors.empty_result: The provider returned no results. Please retry.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.

form.model_desc: 생성 속도와 결과 스타일에 맞는 모드를 선택하세요
form.prompt_placeholder: 장면, 동작, 스타일 등 비디오 내용을 설명하세요
form.prompt_placeholder_multimodal:
Describe the video you want and reference uploaded assets with @, for example:
Make @Video1 follow the rhythm of @Audio1 while keeping the outfit style and color palette from @Image1, with cinematic lighting and a slow push-in camera move
form.reference_image_placeholder: 비디오 생성을 위한 참조 이미지 업로드
form.reference_images_placeholder: Optional references for the subject, style, or scene.
form.image_to_video_hint: Upload a first frame to start image-to-video. Add an end frame if you also want to constrain the final shot.
form.tail_frame_optional: The end frame is optional. Without it, the flow uses a single image reference.
form.add_end_frame_control_hint: Optional. Use it to constrain the final shot.
form.advanced_reference_hint: Add image, video, or audio references when you want tighter control over the result.
form.prompt_reference_hint: Type @ to insert current references such as @Image1, @Video1, or @Audio1.
form.virtual_character_mode_hint: More stable results, slower generation, ideal for character consistency.
form.video_reference_type_desc: Choose whether to upload a general reference or a virtual character asset.
form.general_reference_video_desc: Use it to guide motion, camera, pacing, or overall style.
form.person_reference_video_desc: Use it to guide the result with a virtual character or avatar video.
form.person_reference_video_required: Please upload at least one virtual character video.
form.reference_video_limit: You can upload up to 3 reference videos.
form.reference_audio_limit: You can upload up to 3 reference audios.
form.reference_video_type_error: Only MP4 and MOV videos are supported.
form.reference_audio_type_error: Only MP3 and WAV audios are supported.
form.reference_video_size_error: Reference video is too large. Max size is 50MB.
form.apimart_reference_video_notice: 480P ~ 720P 참조 비디오를 사용하고 실제 인물은 포함하지 마세요.
form.reference_audio_size_error: Reference audio is too large. Max size is 15MB.
form.reference_video_duration_error: Each reference video must be between 2 and 15 seconds.
form.reference_audio_duration_error: Each reference audio must be between 2 and 15 seconds.
form.reference_video_total_duration_error: Total duration of all reference videos cannot exceed 15 seconds.
form.reference_audio_total_duration_error: Total duration of all reference audios cannot exceed 15 seconds.
form.asset_mode_notice: Generation starts after your references are ready.
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: 이미지 업로드 실패, 삭제 후 다시 업로드하세요
form.prompt_too_long: 프롬프트가 너무 깁니다. 일부 내용을 삭제하세요
form.duration_tip_short: 💡 4-6s: Perfect for quick social media attention
form.duration_tip_medium: 💡 7-10s: Great for product showcase and storytelling
form.duration_tip_long: 💡 11-15s: Ideal for complete scenes and complex actions
form.return_last_frame_desc: Also return the final frame image from the generated video.
form.web_search_desc: Allow the model to use online search for current context when needed.
form.upload_in_progress: Please wait for all uploads to finish.
form.upload_failed: Some references failed to upload. Please fix them and try again.
form.asset_processing: Your references are still being prepared. Please try again shortly.
form.asset_failed: Some references could not be prepared. Remove them and upload again.
form.reference_total_limit: You can use up to 12 references in total.
form.reference_audio_requires_visual: Audio references cannot be used with text alone. Add at least one image or video reference.
form.prompt_reference_mode_error: @ references are only supported in multimodal reference mode.
form.prompt_reference_invalid: Your prompt references an unavailable asset. Please insert it again.
form.reference_image_required: Please upload at least one reference image.
form.first_frame_required: Please upload the first frame image.
form.first_last_frame_required: Please upload both the first and last frame images.
form.multimodal_reference_required: Please upload at least one reference.
